name: ruby-nori
title: ruby-nori
description:
XML to Hash translator
Really simple XML parser ripped from Crack which ripped it from Merb.
Nori was created to bypass the stale development of Crack, improve its XML
parser and fix certain issues.
.
Nori supports pluggable parsers and ships with both REXML and Nokogiri
implementations. It defaults to Nokogiri, but you can change it to use REXML.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-nori because XML to Hash translator.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-nori as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-nori with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-nori --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
